modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: StarRez data pull issue with student preferred names.

full_description_text:  
Need to pull all student data from StarRez.  
There is a problem with preferred names.  
Want to make sure everything is updated.  
Using PL/SQL and Banner, but it is not working right.
short_description: StarRez data pull issue with student preferred names.
description:
Need to pull all student data from StarRez.  
There is a problem with preferred names.  
Want to make sure everything is updated.  
Using PL/SQL and Banner, but it is not working right.
